subject: Cannot log in to my account
body: Hi, I've been trying to log in for the past hour and keep getting 'invalid credentials' even though I'm sure my password is correct. I tried resetting the password but the reset email never arrived. Please help.

subject: Charged twice for January subscription
body: I noticed my credit card was charged $99 twice on January 3rd. My account number is ACC-4821. Please refund the duplicate charge as soon as possible.

subject: Request: dark mode for mobile app
body: Love the product! Would it be possible to add a dark mode to the iOS and Android apps? It would save battery and be easier on the eyes at night. Many of my colleagues have also requested this.

subject: URGENT: Production database appears corrupted - all records missing
body: EMERGENCY! We just discovered that our entire production database is empty. All 100,000+ customer records are GONE. We have not done anything unusual. This is a business-critical situation. We are losing $10,000 per hour. PLEASE RESPOND IMMEDIATELY. Account: ENTERPRISE-9912.

subject: How do I export data to CSV?
body: Hi, I'm a new user and trying to figure out how to export my data to CSV format. I looked in Settings and Reports but couldn't find the option. Could you point me in the right direction?

subject: API rate limiting seems too aggressive
body: We're building an integration and hitting the rate limit (429) even though we're well within the documented limits of 1000 req/min. Our current usage is around 200 req/min. Is there a separate limit per endpoint? Rate limit headers show X-RateLimit-Remaining: 0 but X-RateLimit-Limit: 1000.

subject: Refund request for annual plan - we're shutting down
body: Unfortunately our startup is shutting down and we need to cancel our annual plan. We paid $1,188 upfront in October with 7 months remaining. Per your refund policy, we'd like a prorated refund of approximately $693. Please advise on the process.

subject: Feature suggestion: Webhook retry logic
body: Currently when our webhook endpoint is down, failed webhook deliveries are just dropped. Could you add automatic retry with exponential backoff (e.g., 5 retries over 24 hours)? This is standard in similar platforms and would make integrations much more reliable.

subject: Dashboard loading very slowly
body: For the past week our dashboard has been taking 15-20 seconds to load. We have about 50,000 records. Previously it was near-instant. Nothing has changed on our end. Browser: Chrome 120, also slow on Firefox. Is there a known performance issue?

subject: CRITICAL: Security breach - unauthorized access to our account
body: We have detected unauthorized logins to our account from IP addresses in Russia and China. We have already changed passwords but need to know: 1) What data was accessed? 2) How did they get in? 3) Is this a platform-level breach? We are preparing a breach notification to our customers and need answers within 2 hours. Account: SEC-4421.

subject: Can I add multiple payment methods?
body: Hi! Quick question - is it possible to store multiple credit cards on file and choose which one to charge each month? We have separate billing for different departments and it would be super helpful. Thanks!

subject: Duplicate invoices being generated
body: Every time I click 'Generate Invoice' it creates two invoices instead of one. This has been happening for 2 weeks. I now have 40 duplicate invoices that I need to clean up. Invoice numbers: INV-2021 through INV-2060 (every other one is a duplicate).

subject: Please add SSO/SAML support
body: Our company (500 employees) requires SSO for all SaaS tools per our security policy. Do you support SAML 2.0 or OIDC? If not, is it on the roadmap? We've been manually creating accounts which is a major security risk. This is a dealbreaker for us expanding seats.

subject: Wrong currency on invoice
body: My invoices are showing USD but we're in the UK and should be billed in GBP. I selected GBP during signup. The amount is also wrong - showing $120 instead of £120. Please correct invoice INV-8834 and all future invoices.

subject: What are your data retention policies?
body: Hi, our legal team needs to understand your data retention and deletion policies for GDPR compliance. Specifically: 1) How long do you store user data after account deletion? 2) Do you have data processing agreements (DPA)? 3) Where are EU customer data stored? 4) Can we request data deletion?

subject: App crashes on iOS 17 when opening notifications
body: After updating to iOS 17, the app crashes every time I tap on a push notification. The app works fine if I open it normally. This is 100% reproducible on iPhone 15 Pro (iOS 17.1). I tried reinstalling but same issue. 6 of our team members have the same problem.

subject: Feature request: Bulk user import via CSV
body: We're onboarding 200 new employees and manually creating accounts one by one is taking forever. Could you add bulk user import via CSV? Something like: upload a CSV with name/email/role columns and create all accounts at once. This would save us hours of work.

subject: VAT not being applied to our invoices
body: As a UK business we should be charged 20% VAT on our invoices, but it's not being applied. This is causing accounting reconciliation issues. Our VAT number is GB123456789. Please add it to our profile and regenerate the last 3 invoices with VAT applied.

subject: EMERGENCY: Legal team says we need data deletion NOW
body: Our legal department has received a GDPR Right to Deletion request affecting 5,000 customers. We need to delete all their data from your platform within 30 days PER GDPR ARTICLE 17. We are legally liable if this is not done. I need escalation to your legal/privacy team immediately. This is not a normal support request.

subject: How to set up team permissions?
body: Hi! We just upgraded to the Team plan. I'm trying to set up different permission levels for different users (admin, editor, viewer) but can't figure out how to do it. Is there documentation for this? Also can permissions be set per-project rather than globally?

subject: Search results returning wrong data
body: The search feature is returning results for other customers' data when I search for specific terms. I searched for 'Project Alpha' and got results from 'Acme Corp' which is clearly not our company. This is a serious data isolation issue. Account: SAAS-7723.

subject: Zapier integration not triggering
body: I set up a Zap to trigger when a new record is created in your app, but it's not firing. The webhook URL is configured correctly (tested with a direct curl request and got 200). The Zap has been working for 6 months and stopped working 3 days ago around the time of your deployment update.

subject: Suggestion: Mobile app for Android
body: I noticed you only have an iOS app. Any plans to release an Android version? I'm on Android and have to use the mobile browser which isn't great. Many of my colleagues are also Android users and would love a native app experience.

subject: Invoice amount doesn't match quote
body: I received a quote for $450/month but my first invoice shows $520/month. Nobody told me the price would be different. I have the original quote in writing from your sales rep (John Smith). Please honor the original quoted price and credit the $70 difference.

subject: Two-factor authentication not working
body: I enabled 2FA but now I can't log in. The authenticator app code says 'invalid' every time. I've tried syncing my phone's time settings and generating new codes. I'm completely locked out of my account which has critical business data.

subject: Can I get a custom contract/MSA?
body: Our procurement team requires a Master Service Agreement (MSA) before we can process payment for our 1,000 seat enterprise order. Do you have a standard MSA we can review? We may also need a Data Processing Agreement. Who's the right person to contact on your team?

subject: CRITICAL: Payment processor returning errors - we can't collect revenue
body: Our payment gateway integration has been broken for 3 hours. ALL payment attempts are failing with error code PG-500. We are an e-commerce platform with 50+ transactions per hour - we're losing approximately $15,000/hour in revenue. This needs immediate attention from your engineering team. Status page shows all green but something is clearly broken.

subject: Request: Audit log / activity history
body: For compliance purposes we need to be able to see a complete audit trail of all user actions: who did what, when, and from what IP. Currently there's no way to investigate if something goes wrong. This is becoming a hard requirement for our enterprise customers.

subject: Need to update payment method - card expired
body: My credit card on file expires this month and I need to update it to avoid service interruption. I tried adding the new card in Billing > Payment Methods but get an error: 'Unable to save card'. I've tried 3 different browsers. My account is ACCT-3847.

subject: Data import shows wrong encoding for special characters
body: When I import CSV files with French and Spanish characters (é, ñ, ü, etc.), they show as gibberish in the system (e.g., 'CafÃ©' instead of 'Café'). The CSV is saved as UTF-8. This is breaking our multilingual database. Started happening after the v3.4 update.

subject: What integrations do you support?
body: We're evaluating your platform and want to understand the integration ecosystem. Specifically looking for: Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, Jira, and GitHub integrations. Are these native integrations or via Zapier? Also, do you have an open API for custom integrations?

subject: Free trial expired but we didn't get a warning
body: Our free trial expired today and we lost access to all our data without any advance warning email. We have important data in the system and need to either extend the trial 1 week so we can evaluate properly, or sign up immediately. Can you please restore access?

subject: Graphs and charts not rendering on Safari
body: All charts and visualizations are blank/not loading in Safari 17 on macOS Sonoma. Console shows: 'Error: undefined is not an object (evaluating canvas.getContext)'. Chrome and Firefox work fine. Many of our customers use Safari as their primary browser.

subject: Feature: Recurring report scheduling
body: Currently I have to manually run reports every Monday morning. Could you add scheduling so reports automatically run and email to selected recipients? Weekly, monthly, and custom schedules would be ideal. Many analytics platforms have this and it's a huge time saver.

subject: Invoice shows old address after I updated it
body: I updated my billing address 2 weeks ago (Billing > Account Settings > Address) but invoices are still showing my old address. This is causing issues with our accounting department. Current invoices need to be reissued with the correct address: 456 New Street, Austin TX 78701.

subject: How do I archive old projects?
body: We have accumulated 200+ completed projects over the past 2 years and the dashboard is getting cluttered. Is there a way to archive or hide completed projects without deleting them? We need to keep the data for reference but don't want them in the main view.

subject: EMERGENCY: Our service is down because of your API
body: Your API has been returning 503 errors for the past 45 minutes. Our entire product depends on your API and we are completely down. Our customers cannot use our service. Every minute this is down costs us money and customer trust. I need a status update IMMEDIATELY and an ETA for resolution.

subject: Request: Keyboard shortcuts
body: Power user feature request: keyboard shortcuts for common actions. Specifically: Cmd+N for new item, Cmd+/ for search, Cmd+S to save. Looking at your competitors, they all have this and it significantly speeds up workflow. Would love to see this in a future release!

subject: Notifications are not working
body: I have email notifications enabled for all events but stopped receiving them 5 days ago. Checked spam folder - nothing there. My email is valid (I receive other emails fine). Other team members say the same thing. Account: NOTIFY-5512.

subject: Price increase without prior notice is unacceptable
body: My bill went from $99 to $149 this month without any email notification. I checked my email and there was nothing from you about a price change. This is very poor practice. I'd like either: 1) Grandfathered pricing until my contract year ends, or 2) A full refund so I can cancel. This is not how you treat loyal customers of 3 years.

subject: Can I use the API without a credit card?
body: I'm a developer building a personal project and want to use your API for evaluation purposes. Do you offer a free tier that doesn't require a credit card? I just want to test the integration before deciding to pay.

subject: File upload size too small
body: The 10MB file upload limit is too restrictive for our use case. We regularly work with video files (100-500MB) and design files (50-200MB). Workaround of using external storage links is clunky. Could the limit be increased for Pro tier users?

subject: PDF reports showing incorrect date format
body: PDF exports show dates as MM/DD/YYYY but we're in Germany and need DD.MM.YYYY format. I've set my locale to German in profile settings but the PDF generator ignores it. This is causing confusion with our German clients who receive reports in the wrong format.

subject: Request: Custom fields on records
body: We need to track some custom data fields specific to our industry (pharmaceutical). Specifically: compound_id, clinical_trial_phase, regulatory_status. Is there a way to add custom fields to records? If not, this would be a huge win for us and probably for other regulated industry customers.

subject: Double charged on annual renewal
body: My annual subscription renewed yesterday and the amount charged ($1,188) was double what I paid last year ($594). I didn't upgrade my plan. Please investigate and refund the difference. Transaction ID: TXN-847291.

subject: URGENT: Ransomware may have accessed our account
body: We have reason to believe ransomware on one of our employee's computers may have accessed our account. We need you to: 1) Immediately revoke all active sessions 2) Enable geographic restrictions 3) Generate an access log for the past 30 days 4) Lock the account pending investigation. This is a potential data breach situation.

subject: Thank you for the amazing support yesterday!
body: Just wanted to say a huge thank you to your support team member Sarah who helped us recover from a data issue yesterday. She stayed on the call for 3 hours and was incredibly patient and knowledgeable. You have an amazing team. We just renewed our annual contract partly because of this experience!

subject: Autocomplete suggestions showing incorrect/outdated data
body: The autocomplete dropdown when searching for customer names is showing companies we deleted over a year ago. This is confusing our sales team who keep selecting deleted accounts and getting errors. The ghost entries need to be purged from whatever search index you're using.

subject: Request: Multi-language support (Spanish)
body: We're expanding to Latin America and need to support Spanish-speaking customers. Is your platform available in Spanish? If not, could we help with translation? We'd be willing to provide Spanish translations for the UI in exchange for an extended beta period. ¿Hablan español?

subject: Downgrade plan question
body: We're downsizing our team from 25 to 10 members and want to downgrade from Enterprise to Business plan. What's the process? Will we get a prorated credit? When does the change take effect? Also what features will we lose and is there any data we need to export first?

subject: Color contrast in dark mode is too low
body: The dark mode UI has very low color contrast, especially for secondary text. As a user with mild visual impairment (deuteranopia), this makes the app very hard to use. WCAG 2.1 AA requires 4.5:1 contrast ratio but your dark mode text appears to be around 2:1. Accessibility matters!

subject: Incorrect tax calculation on invoices
body: Our US invoices are not applying state sales tax correctly. We're in California (9.5% combined rate) but invoices show either 0% or a flat 8%. This is creating issues for our tax filings. Invoice numbers affected: INV-9001 through INV-9045.

subject: Team member can't accept invitation
body: I invited 5 new team members 3 days ago but they say the invitation link is expired or invalid. I've resent invitations twice but same issue. The links are only 24 hours valid which is too short - team members don't always check email same day. Can you manually add them or extend the link validity?

subject: Can I transfer my account to another email?
body: I'm leaving my current company and want to transfer my personal account (with personal projects) to a new email address before my work email is deactivated next month. I know you normally do account merges - is this possible? Timeline is urgent as deactivation is in 3 weeks.

subject: Bulk delete not working for large selections
body: When I try to bulk delete more than 100 records, the operation appears to complete (spinner goes away, success message shows) but the records are still there when I refresh. For <100 records it works fine. This is a blocking issue as I have 50,000 test records to clean up.

subject: Feature: Gantt chart view for project tasks
body: We heavily use task management and a Gantt chart view would be transformative for our project planning. Currently we have to copy data to Microsoft Project to create Gantt charts. Native Gantt with dependencies and critical path visualization would probably make 80% of our Jira usage obsolete.

subject: Payment declined but account still active - billing confusion
body: My payment failed last week (I received the decline email) but my account is still active and I can access everything. Will I be automatically charged when I update my card? Or will there be service interruption? Confused about what happens next. Card is now updated.

subject: CRITICAL - Data center on fire (literally) - need emergency data recovery
body: Our on-premise infrastructure suffered a catastrophic fire this morning. We have been using your backup sync feature to maintain cloud copies of critical data. We need EMERGENCY access to our backed-up data for business continuity. This is not a drill. Company: Phoenix Industries, Account: CRIT-1101. Everything depends on this.

subject: Calendar sync not working with Google Calendar
body: I connected my Google Calendar integration but events created in your app don't appear in Google Calendar and vice versa. I've reconnected the integration 3 times. OAuth seems to complete successfully (I see it in my Google account's connected apps) but sync never happens.

subject: Request: AI-powered auto-categorization
body: Would love to see AI/ML-based auto-categorization for our items. Right now we have to manually tag everything. If the system could analyze item content and suggest or auto-apply categories, it would save us significant time. Happy to be a beta tester if this is in development!

subject: Getting unexpected charges for storage overage
body: I just noticed a $47 overage charge for 'storage' on my invoice but I'm on the Unlimited plan. How can an Unlimited plan have storage overages? Please waive this charge and clarify what 'unlimited' actually means in your pricing.

subject: What's the difference between the Business and Enterprise plans?
body: Trying to decide between Business ($99/mo) and Enterprise (custom pricing). The feature comparison table on your website is hard to understand. Can someone walk me through the key differences? Specifically about: API rate limits, SLA guarantees, dedicated support, and SSO.

subject: Email templates not sending despite SMTP configuration
body: I configured our custom SMTP server for sending automated emails (Postfix, port 587, TLS). The test email sends successfully but actual triggered emails (welcome, password reset, notifications) are never delivered. Mail server logs show no incoming connection from your servers.

subject: Feature: Conditional logic for forms
body: We use your form builder extensively. The biggest missing feature is conditional logic - showing/hiding fields based on previous answers. For example, if customer selects 'Enterprise', show company size field, otherwise hide it. Any plans to add this?

subject: Annual vs monthly pricing - getting billed monthly despite annual signup
body: I specifically signed up for annual billing to get the 20% discount, but I'm being charged monthly. My signup confirmation email shows annual plan but invoices show monthly. I've paid 4 months and should have paid 1 annual payment by now. Please fix this and credit the overpayment.

subject: URGENT: Personal data of EU citizens exposed in bug
body: We discovered a bug in your platform that appears to expose the personal data of EU citizens in API responses that should be redacted. Specifically, endpoint GET /api/users/{id} returns full PII including home addresses and phone numbers to any authenticated user regardless of permissions. Under GDPR Article 83, violations can result in fines up to 4% of global annual turnover. We need this escalated to your DPO immediately.

subject: Print view is broken - everything overlaps
body: The print view (Ctrl+P / File > Print) is completely broken. All elements overlap with each other and text is cut off. We regularly print reports to PDF for client presentations and this used to work fine. Broke sometime in the last month.

subject: Suggestion: Offline mode for mobile app
body: Our field team works in areas with spotty internet. An offline mode that syncs when connection is restored would be huge for us. We've been using paper for offline situations and manually entering data later, which is error-prone and time-consuming. Is this on the roadmap?

subject: Coupon code not applying correctly
body: I have a coupon code 'SAVE50' for 50% off but when I apply it at checkout it only takes 10% off. I found this code on your official Twitter account. Can you honor the 50% discount? If the code is expired, could you apply the discount manually given it was advertised by your official account?

subject: Page timing out on large datasets
body: Our reports page times out (504 Gateway Timeout) when we select date ranges longer than 90 days. We have about 2M records and need quarterly and annual reports. The query must be running too long on your end. Is there a way to get these reports without the timeout?

subject: Interest in white-label version
body: We're a digital agency with 50+ clients and we're interested in white-labeling your platform under our brand for reseller purposes. Do you have a white-label or reseller program? What would the pricing model look like and what customizations are allowed?

subject: EMERGENCY: All API keys have been compromised
body: We just ran a security audit and found that our API keys were inadvertently committed to a public GitHub repository. They've been exposed for at least 72 hours. We need to: 1) Immediately rotate ALL API keys for our account 2) See a log of all API calls made with the compromised keys in the past 72 hours 3) Assess if any data was exfiltrated. Account: API-BREACH-7721. URGENT.

subject: Date picker not working on mobile
body: The date picker/calendar widget doesn't work on mobile browsers (iOS Safari and Chrome on Android). When you tap a date field on mobile, the native date picker appears briefly then disappears without selecting. Desktop works fine. About 40% of our users are on mobile.

subject: Can training/onboarding be included in our contract?
body: We're signing a 50-seat enterprise contract. Can you include onboarding training sessions for our team? Specifically we'd like: 1) Admin training (2 hours) 2) End-user training (1 hour for all 50 users) 3) Written documentation customized to our workflows. Can this be scoped into the contract?

subject: Failed to export data - file is corrupted
body: When I export to Excel (.xlsx), I get a file that Excel says is 'corrupted and may not be safe to open'. After repair it opens but the data is truncated at row 65,535 which seems like an old Excel row limit. We have 200,000+ rows. CSV export works but formatting is lost.

subject: Feature: Real-time collaboration (Google Docs style)
body: My biggest feature wish: real-time collaborative editing like Google Docs, where multiple team members can edit the same document/record simultaneously and see each other's cursors. Currently we have to use 'check-out' system to prevent conflicts which slows everyone down.

subject: Charged for a seat I deleted months ago
body: I removed a user from my account (username: john.smith@contractor.com) in September but I'm still being charged for their seat. That's 4 months of $29/seat = $116 I've been overcharged. Please refund and confirm the user is actually removed from your billing system.

subject: CRITICAL: Complete outage for all users - none can log in
body: Starting 30 minutes ago, NONE of our 500 users can log in. The login page loads but after entering credentials says 'An error occurred, please try again'. Your status page says operational but clearly something is broken. We have board members in the office who need access NOW. ESCALATE IMMEDIATELY.

subject: Import wizard losing data for optional fields
body: When importing customer data via the import wizard, records with empty optional fields (phone, company, notes) lose data from later required fields. Seems like a parsing/offset bug. Example: Row with no phone number results in company name going into phone field and so on.

subject: Suggestion: Version history / undo for records
body: We've had several incidents where team members accidentally overwrote important data. Could you add version history for records (like Git history) so we can roll back to previous states? Or at minimum, a 24-hour undo for deletions? This would give us much more confidence in using the platform for critical data.

subject: Wrong plan on account after upgrading
body: I upgraded from Starter to Pro 3 days ago (order confirmation attached), paid the difference ($40), but my account still shows Starter plan with restricted features. I can't use the Pro features I just paid for. Transaction ID: TXN-928134.

subject: SSO authentication keeps logging me out
body: After setting up SAML SSO with Okta, the session expires every 15 minutes and forces re-authentication with Okta. Our Okta session is set to 8 hours. The frequent interruptions are disrupting our entire workflow. Is there a session timeout setting in your SAML configuration?

subject: How do notifications work for mention @?
body: Quick question: if I @mention a colleague in a comment, do they get an email? An in-app notification? Both? And can they configure their notification preferences? Also does it work the same on mobile? Just trying to figure out the best way to get people's attention.

subject: Need invoice re-issued with new company name
body: Our company rebranded from 'TechWidget LLC' to 'Nexus Solutions Inc' last month. Could you update our account billing name and reissue the last 2 invoices with the new company name? Our accountants need the correct name for tax purposes.

subject: URGENT: Customer data leak - wrong data shown to wrong user
body: We have confirmed that your platform is showing wrong customers' private data to logged-in users. User A can see User B's entire order history, personal contact info, and payment methods. This is a severe multi-tenant isolation failure. You need to take this system offline for inspection immediately. We are a healthcare company and this involves PHI. We are filing a breach report with HHS regardless of your response. Account: HIPAA-8821.

subject: Feature request: Native Slack integration
body: Any plans for a native Slack integration? Specifically: 1) Get notifications in Slack channels when items are updated 2) Create new items from Slack with /slash commands 3) Search your app from Slack. Currently using Zapier workaround but it's laggy and sometimes fails.

subject: Error 403 when trying to access shared link
body: A colleague shared a link to a document with me but I get 'Access Denied (403)' when I click it. I have an account and I'm logged in. My colleague says they shared it with 'Anyone with link' permission. I've tried incognito mode and a different browser. Same error.

subject: Is there a non-profit discount?
body: We're a registered 501(c)(3) non-profit focused on climate solutions. Do you offer special pricing for non-profits? We currently can't afford the standard pricing but your platform would be perfect for managing our volunteer coordination and donor data. Many SaaS companies offer 50-80% discounts for non-profits.

subject: Charts not updating after data changes
body: When I update or add data, the charts and dashboards don't reflect the changes until I do a hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R). Regular refresh (F5) shows old data. This makes real-time monitoring impossible. We have live dashboards displayed on office screens that need to show current data.

subject: Annual renewal invoice has wrong tax rate
body: Our annual renewal invoice applied 25% VAT but we're registered for VAT in the EU (VAT#: DE321654987) and should be under reverse charge mechanism (0% VAT). We've provided our VAT number before. Please issue a credit note for the incorrect VAT amount (€240) and a corrected invoice.

subject: Feature: Public API documentation with interactive examples
body: Your API docs are hard to use because there are no interactive examples (no 'Try it out' functionality). Could you add Swagger UI / OpenAPI interactive documentation? Being able to test API calls directly in the docs without setting up Postman would massively speed up developer integration.

subject: Webhooks delivering duplicate events
body: Our webhook handler is receiving duplicate events - sometimes 3-4x the same event within milliseconds. This is causing duplicate records in our database. We've implemented deduplication by event ID on our end but still seeing events with different IDs for the same logical action.

subject: URGENT: Service degradation affecting SLA - need incident report
body: Our Enterprise SLA guarantees 99.9% uptime but your service has been degraded for 6+ hours today (slow responses, timeouts on search). This is the 3rd time this month. Per our contract, we need: 1) Incident report within 24h 2) SLA credit for downtime 3) Root cause analysis. CC'ing our account manager.

subject: How to set up automated backups?
body: I want to set up automated backups of our data to our S3 bucket on a daily schedule. I see there's an API endpoint for exports but I'm not sure how to automate it and send to S3. Is there a built-in backup feature or scheduled export? Or would I need to script this myself?

subject: Tables not displaying correctly in embedded view
body: When I embed your app in an iframe on our internal portal, table columns are misaligned and the horizontal scroll doesn't work. The app works perfectly when opened directly. Iframe dimensions are 1200x800px. This is for an internal dashboard our whole team uses.

subject: Proposal: Become beta tester for new features
body: I've been using your product for 2 years and consider myself a power user. I'd love to be part of a beta testing program for new features before they launch. I can provide detailed, structured feedback and edge case testing. Do you have a formal beta program? How can I apply?

subject: Accidentally deleted important data - need recovery
body: A team member accidentally deleted an entire project (Project Phoenix) with 200 tasks and all associated files. This happened 2 hours ago. Is there any way to recover this? Do you have point-in-time backups? We are willing to pay for data recovery if needed. This project represents 3 months of work.

subject: Request: Customizable dashboard widgets
body: The dashboard is great but we'd love to be able to: 1) Rearrange widgets by drag-and-drop 2) Create custom widgets with our own metrics 3) Save different dashboard layouts per team role 4) Set a public read-only dashboard link for stakeholders. Is any of this planned?

subject: Multi-currency support request
body: We operate in 15 countries and need to display prices and generate invoices in local currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD). Right now everything is in USD which creates confusion and extra work for our finance team doing currency conversions. Is multi-currency on your roadmap?

subject: Thank you and a question about referral program
body: Just wanted to say your product has been fantastic for our team this year - we've saved at least 10 hours per week using it. Quick question: do you have a referral or affiliate program? We've already recommended you to 3 other companies in our network and would love to get some credit for those referrals!
